title: tasks.json — the work graph (the single source of truth for work)
description: Written by the Planner; frozen during a build (a change to scope means a re-plan, not an in-flight edit). At runtime, the execution system is the sole writer of task state.

created_by.description: the Planner version that emitted this

frozen.description: immutable during a build; change = re-plan

file_whitelist.description: the ONLY files this task may touch (strict scope + clean worktree partition)

owner_role.description: worker role (see the execution system's worker roster)

assigned_to.description: manager/orchestrator name; set by the execution system

irreversible.description: guarded by a once-flag + a human gate before the build performs it
